title: Room in Rome
tmdbOverview: A hotel room in the center of Rome serves as the setting for Alba and Natasha, two sexy and recently acquainted women, to have a physical adventure that touches their very souls.
synopsis: Room in Rome (2010) is a drama and romance film from Spain and France. It carries a 6.0 rating on IMDb. It's one of the titles we feature across our 2010s and genre rankings. It carries a 16 certification (DE rating system) — see the film's page for parental details.
